track.title: Production RAG & Advanced Retrieval
track.description: Minimal catalog for RAG engineering — embeddings through production retrieval systems.

nodes.title: Embeddings fundamentals
outcomes: Explain what an embedding captures about text
Choose a reasonable embedding model for a corpus
Compute and compare cosine similarity
rubric: Describes embedding as dense semantic vector
Names a trade-off between model size and quality
Interprets similarity scores on a small example

nodes.title: Chunking strategies
outcomes: Split documents with fixed and semantic chunking
Choose chunk size and overlap for a use case
Preserve metadata (source, section) on chunks
rubric: Explains when fixed vs semantic chunking wins
Justifies chunk size for a sample corpus
Shows how metadata survives into retrieval

nodes.title: Vector retrieval
outcomes: Build a vector index over chunked documents
Run top-k retrieval for a user query
Debug empty or low-relevance result sets
rubric: Describes index build and query path
Names failure modes (bad query, wrong chunking)
Proposes a fix for low relevance

nodes.title: Reranking
outcomes: Apply a reranker on top-k candidates
Compare dense-only vs hybrid retrieval
Measure lift from reranking on a sample set
rubric: Explains why rerank follows retrieval
Describes hybrid BM25 + dense briefly
Defines a simple before/after metric

nodes.title: Grounded generation
outcomes: Prompt the model to answer only from retrieved context
Attach citations or source ids to answers
Detect and refuse when context is insufficient
rubric: Shows a grounded prompt pattern
Explains citation / source attribution
Describes refusal when context is empty

nodes.title: RAG evaluation
outcomes: Define faithfulness and context relevance metrics
Build a small golden Q&A set for a corpus
Run offline eval and interpret failures
rubric: Defines at least two RAG metrics
Describes a golden-set workflow
Links a failed case to a pipeline stage

nodes.title: Production RAG
outcomes: Serve a RAG endpoint with latency budgets
Add basic tracing for retrieval + generation
Plan re-index and cache invalidation
rubric: Names production concerns (latency, cost, freshness)
Describes a minimal observability path
Outlines re-index / cache strategy
